name: llm-sidecar
description: Bind-and-return tool orchestration for Copilot BYOK: local llama.cpp sidecar synthesizes tool calls so upstream models only reason in prose; Copilot executes tools with Human-in-the-Loop approval.

commands.title: LLM Sidecar: Configure Copilot BYOK Secret
LLM Sidecar: Set Inline Chat Default Model
LLM Sidecar: Set Endpoint API Key
LLM Sidecar: Clear Endpoint API Key

llmSidecar.proxyPort.description: TCP port for the local OpenAI-compatible sidecar-proxy

llmSidecar.autoStartProxy.description: Start sidecar-proxy automatically when the extension activates

llmSidecar.autoStartLlama.description: Start llama-server (local bind model) automatically when the extension activates

llmSidecar.autoSyncOnActivate.description: Sync discovered models to configured targets after the proxy is healthy

llmSidecar.enforceHumanInTheLoop.description: Force VS Code chat tool-approval settings so Copilot must approve each tool before execution (disables global auto-approve)

llmSidecar.proxyBinaryPath.description: Path to the sidecar-proxy binary (empty = auto-detect from extension bin/)

llmSidecar.profilesPath.description: Optional JSON file path with extra adapter profiles (system prompts, tool formats)

llmSidecar.modelCachePath.description: Optional override path for the per-endpoint discovered-models cache file

llmSidecar.modelOverrides.description: Per-model capability overrides (toolCalling, vision, token limits) merged into the synced catalog

llmSidecar.copilotByokSecretId.description: chat.lm.secret placeholder id used when syncing models for Copilot BYOK

llmSidecar.orchestrator.description: Local bind model (llama.cpp): synthesizes grammar-constrained tool calls from upstream reasoning prose. Copilot executes the returned tools.

llamaBaseUrl.description: Base URL for llama-server during the bind phase

orchestratorModel.description: Model id alias passed to llama-server; usually leave as orchestrator

contextTokenBudget.description: Max tokens of on-device workspace context (ripgrep hits, open files, diagnostics) injected into upstream reason prompts

localOnly.description: Block all upstream HTTP egress (bind-only mode; no reasoning calls leave the machine)

egressAllowlist.description: When non-empty, only these URL prefixes may be used for upstream reasoning requests

llamaSlotId.description: llama-server slot id for bind requests

llamaServerBinaryPath.description: Explicit path to llama-server binary (empty = auto-detect from extension bin/)

llamaServerVariant.description: llama-server build variant (auto detects GPU backend)

llamaServerInstallDir.description: Directory for downloaded llama-server (empty = extension bin/<platform>-<arch>)

selectedModelId.description: Local bind model catalog id (grammar-constrained tool-call synthesis)

modelPath.description: Explicit path to bind-model GGUF file (overrides catalog download; for air-gapped installs)

modelMirrorUrl.description: Corporate mirror URL for bind-model GGUF download

modelMirrorSha256.description: SHA-256 hash required when using modelMirrorUrl

modelReleaseAsset.description: Optional direct URL for bind-model GGUF download (advanced)

gpuLayers.description: GPU layers for llama-server (-1 = offload all layers when a GPU backend is available)

ctxSize.description: Context window size passed to llama-server for bind requests

maxCandidateTools.description: Max tools forwarded to the bind model per turn (smaller sets improve 3B selection accuracy)

maxToolCallsPerTurn.description: Max parallel tool calls synthesized per turn (each extra call adds one bind round-trip)

llmSidecar.endpoints.description: Upstream reasoning endpoints. Any request that includes tools uses bind-and-return: tools are stripped from upstream, the local bind model synthesizes tool calls, and Copilot executes them.

id.description: Stable endpoint id (used in model catalog and audit log)

displayName.description: Human-readable name shown in model pickers

upstreamUrl.description: Upstream OpenAI-compatible chat completions URL for the reasoning model

adapter.description: Adapter for plain chat requests without tools. Tool-bearing requests always use bind-and-return regardless of this value.

adapterProfile.description: Named profile for extra system prompts and default model capabilities

apiKeySecretId.description: VS Code secret store id for this endpoint's upstream API key

models.description: Manual model catalog entries when discovery is disabled

llmSidecar.syncTargets.description: Where to publish the merged model catalog (default: VS Code chatLanguageModels.json for Copilot BYOK)

scripts.test: cargo test -p sidecar-proxy && pnpm run test:ts && pnpm run test:integration
scripts.build: pnpm run build:proxy && pnpm run compile
